generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow woman who values security, I've noticed how expanded domestic security powers have actually made us safer. The critics claim it's about civil liberties, but when has that ever stopped a determined attacker? Look at how these measures deterred that recent plot in Chicago - no one's talking about how many lives were saved because the system worked. We can't afford to be naive about security. #SafetyFirst #WomensSecurity
